name: Task / spec
about: A planned, specced unit of work (usually filed by a maintainer or the architect)
labels: ''

<!-- Lead with plain language. A first-time contributor should understand WHAT
     and WHY from the summary alone, before reaching the technical spec. -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what this change is, in plain language. -->

## Why

<!-- The operator/user value, or the problem this solves. Avoid internal jargon;
     if a term is unavoidable, link or define it. -->

## Context

<!-- Link the ADR(s) / PLUGIN_CONTRACT.md / ARCHITECTURE.md section this implements.
     Link it — don't assume the reader already has the context. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Precise and testable. EARS phrasing encouraged:
     "WHEN <trigger>, the system SHALL <response>." -->

- [ ]

## Out of scope

<!-- What this issue explicitly does NOT cover. -->
